name: AMP
_comment: Amazon Managed Grafana (AMG) handles SigV4 automatically when the workspace
has AMP listed as a data source. Import this JSON via the AMG console:
Grafana Console → Configuration → Data Sources → Add data source → Amazon Managed Service for Prometheus
aws grafana create-workspace-api-key ... and POST to /api/datasources
Replace <workspace-id> with your AMP workspace ID.
Replace eu-central-1 with your AMP workspace region.
